items.name_en: In Stock 25P mini Panda🐼 color backpack
items.name_cn:
In Stock 25P mini Panda🐼 color backpack
The palm-sized mini backpack is right up my alley. Made of lambskin with a quilted design and a small front pocket, it has no unnecessary details. Don't let the size fool you; it can actually hold a phone, lipstick, compact powder, tissues, and other small items. More importantly, it offers multiple carrying styles: backpack, shoulder bag, crossbody, handbag, etc. You can carry it however you like.
Size: 22*18*10cm 99473

items.name_en: In Stock 25s hobo, I really love it, one bag three uses
items.name_cn:
In Stock 25s hobo, I really love it, one bag three uses
Medium size with a very lazy vibe! Pull the strap tight to instantly turn it into a backpack 🎒. Loosen the strap to turn it into a single-shoulder hobo. The flexible strap design is amazing. The front of the bag features a simple and elegant large quilted pattern. Dual metal chains on both sides with double-C adjustable buckles. Calfskin is soft, delicate, practical, and easy to maintain! The strap is adjustable for DIY carrying styles: underarm hobo, backpack, shoulder bag, handbag, etc....
Size: 20*31*8.5cm 99471

items.name_en: Ohanel 24A duma Backpack Starlight Purple Large Stock Available | Real Photos
items.name_cn:
Ohanel 24A duma Backpack Starlight Purple Large Stock Available | Real Photos
🫶First glance is beautiful, second glance you're obsessed🫶The vintage duma is in high demand, no need to say more🤟This duma has two more pockets than the previous one, adding a biker and cool vibe, making it more casual and laid-back😎The leather is durable calfskin, who can resist?This comes in two sizes, small and large🆚The small one is exquisite and compact, the large one is not too big, just right👌The capacity is huge, phones and daily essentials are no problem, and the two front pockets are really useful!Even a compact powder case fits!!🤟🤟If you hesitate for a second, it might be gone🔥Buy it buy it buy it❗️❗️❗️
(16.5*17.5*10cm)
(21*20*12cm)

items.name_en: In Stock: Chane🌱Vintage Backpack Black Lambskin
items.name_cn:
In Stock: Chane🌱Vintage Backpack Black Lambskin
To be honest ❤️This is a vintage backpack that can be passed down for generations!Classic double C logo, quilted pattern paired with gold metal, leather chain strap, full of texture. The lambskin is soft and delicate, you can't help but want to own and cherish it!It can be used in all four seasons and suits any style💃It must be in your handbag collection
Small: Dimensions 17× 7× 15cm
Number: A2211
